blockers.description: No FTP/SSH password available in this environment; SSH key was rejected by hostiman server.
blockers.workaround: User will upload dist.zip and admin files manually and call deploy.php.

human_actions_pending.action: URGENT: delete admin/users.json from server, change ALL admin passwords, remove test users, make GitHub repo private
human_actions_pending.context: users.json with bcrypt hashes was publicly downloadable (live) and is in public git history. Code migrated to users.php; repo file deleted in 9fb81a0.

human_actions_pending.action: Deploy: upload public/admin/ to server + fresh dist.zip via deploy.php; then set DEPLOY_KEY (new random) in api/config.local.php and update deploy URL habit
human_actions_pending.context: Prod was running outdated admin API (old cookies/RBAC). deploy.php now reads DEPLOY_KEY from config.local.php when set.

human_actions_pending.action: Fill SMTP_PASS in api/config.local.php (mail.ru app password); optional: BOT_TOKEN /revoke
human_actions_pending.context: Email channel still down until SMTP_PASS set. BOT_TOKEN was exposed in chat.

human_actions_pending.action: Ask hostiman support to add nginx deny rules for *.json/dotfiles (or disable nginx static processing)
human_actions_pending.context: .htaccess protection is bypassed by nginx static serving; backups and json files are publicly accessible.

decisions.decision: Store admin users in users.php (PHP file returning an array) instead of users.json, with auto-migration on first read.
decisions.rationale: nginx serves .json statically bypassing Apache/.htaccess protection, so password hashes were publicly downloadable. A .php file is always executed and outputs nothing. Works regardless of server static-file config.

decisions.decision: Default-deny in admin API save action: files outside permissionMap require admin role.
decisions.rationale: site.json and gallery-portfolio.json (and any future files) were writable by any authenticated editor — confirmed privilege escalation in local test.

decisions.decision: Add/delete in admin JS re-renders from local state (loadSection(section, true)) after syncing DOM into currentData, instead of immediate server refetch; uploads save immediately via the same sync helpers.
decisions.rationale: Server refetch after local mutation silently discarded all add/delete operations and unsaved edits (confirmed in puppeteer run).

decisions.decision: Register inline-handler functions via Object.assign(window, {...}) in admin.js.
decisions.rationale: oxlint cannot see references from inline onclick/onchange HTML strings and reported ~49 false-positive unused-vars; explicit registration keeps the linter useful for real dead code (now 0 warnings).

next_action: User performs urgent server-side security actions (users.json, passwords, repo private, admin deploy, DEPLOY_KEY). Then verify admin login + form delivery. Next todos: todo-011 (privacy), todo-005 (analytics).
context_notes: 2026-07-20 evening: security review done (1 CRITICAL: public users.json with bcrypt hashes — repo side fixed, server side pending; 5 HIGH all have fixes deployed or pending deploy). Code-track fixes committed 9fb81a0: rate-limit flock, JSON-LD < escape, contactMethod whitelist, field type-safety, phone digits validation, pkg.price escape, 8h session TTL, login lockout 5/15min, htaccess Require denied, robots Disallow admin, deploy key from config. Admin panel fixes from parallel chat included (users.php migration, RBAC, cookie flags, admin.js cleanup). npm audit 0 vulns. Latest commits: 9fb81a0, b674524.
